prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东南大学在甘肃省理科（2024年起为物理类）最低录取位次分别为约1729名→1461名→1204名→868名→728名，呈持续前移趋势，近5年累计前移约1001 名，近3年累计前移约476名；2025年基准位次约728名，为历史最高水平；2021–2025年该校在甘肃省理科/物理类招生计划均为41人，保持稳定；2026年物理类计划大幅扩招至73人，较2025年增加32人，扩幅约78%，为近年来最大规模扩招，显著增加招生名额，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大 学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第15名（2021年第17→2022年第16→2023年第15→2024年第13→2025年第16→2026年第15），长期稳居全国Top20， 属于顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉数据中未收录东南大学相关事件；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（师德师风事件），2021年偏负面（校园安全事件），但均为较早周 期事件，对2026年报考心理影响有限；抖音热度总排名第31位（样本17条视频，综合热度137万），评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映一定报考关注度；近年无投 档线断档或暴跌记录，录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达18个，其中A+学科5个（交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学 与技术），A学科2个（仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、城乡规划学、风景园林学），A-学科11个（含计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、电气工程、机械工程等），工科实 力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度高；土木建筑类专业呈"分化观望"至"明显劝退"趋势。甘肃省考生总数：2021年理科约11.3万→2025年物理类约12.1万，2026年总考生约21.87万，按近年物理类占比约66 .6%估算，2026年物理类考生约14.6万人，较2025年增长约20%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对西北地区考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生计划占比较小（2025年41人/全国总计划），属 跨省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势（反映报考热度上升）、2026年招生计划大幅扩招78%（缓解竞争）、甘肃省物理类考生增长约20%（加剧竞 争）、学校层次顶尖且工科优势突出、相关专业社会热度高等因素，但结合考生规模扩大和持续上升的报考热度进行有 限修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约1019名，较2025年728名后移约291名（位次数字增大，更易进），区间903–1135名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与电气工程）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学等）
- 工科试验班（智慧建造与智能交通）
- 建筑类（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化培养）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年东南大学在甘肃省物理类大幅扩招至73人，预测最低位次约1019名（区间903–1135名），较2025年有所后移。位次在900名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（吴健雄班 、计算机类）；位次在900–1050名区间建议以二档专业为主（电子信息类、智慧能源、智能制造），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在1050–1150名区间可重点考虑三档专业保底（理科试验 班、智慧建造、建筑类、临床医学），同时争取二档机会。东南大学工科实力顶尖，A+学科众多，建议结合个人兴趣和学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southeast University in Gansu Province's science category (Physics Category from 2024) were approximately 1729 → 1461 → 1204 → 868 → 728, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1001 places in the past 5 years and about 476 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 728, the highest historical level; from 2021 to 2025, the university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province's science/Physics Category was 41 students, remaining stable; in 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly expands to 73 students, an increase of 32 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 78%, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing enrollment slots, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 15th (2021: 17th → 2022: 16th → 2023: 15th → 2024: 13th → 2025: 16th → 2026: 15th), consistently in the national Top 20, a top engineering powerhouse; no related events for Southeast University were recorded in the 2026 reputation data; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), and 2021 was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but these are earlier cycle events with limited impact on 2026 application psychology; Douyin heat total ranking 31st (sample 17 videos, comprehensive heat 1.37 million), rated as "relatively hot", short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a certain level of application attention; no record of cutoff line drops or crashes in recent years, admission trend stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 2 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture), and 11 A- disciplines (including Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), with extremely outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application heat; civil and architectural majors show a trend of "differentiation and wait-and-see" to "obvious discouragement". Total number of examinees in Gansu Province: 2021 science about 113,000 → 2025 Physics Category about 121,000, 2026 total examinees about 218,700, estimated Physics Category examinees in 2026 about 146,000 based on recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.6%, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025, expanding examinee scale intensifying competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to candidates from the northwest region; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province accounts for a small proportion (2025: 41 students/total national plan), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings (reflecting rising application heat), the significant 78% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the approximately 20% increase in Gansu Province Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the university's top-tier level and outstanding engineering advantages, and the high social heat of related majors, but with limited correction based on the expanding examinee scale and continuously rising application heat, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1019, a backward shift of about 291 places compared to 2025's 728 (ranking number increases, easier to enter), with a range of 903–1135.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Transportation)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Southeast University significantly expands its Physics Category enrollment in Gansu Province to 73 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1019 (range 903–1135), a backward shift compared to 2025. Candidates with rankings within 900 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Computer Science); candidates in the 900–1050 ranking range are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Smart Energy, Intelligent Manufacturing), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates in the 1050–1150 ranking range can focus on Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Science Experimental Class, Smart Construction, Architecture, Clinical Medicine), while also striving for Tier 2 opportunities. Southeast University has top-tier engineering strength with numerous A+ disciplines, and it is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.
